# opnsense_acme_account (Data Source)

Look up an existing ACME account on OPNsense by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing ACME account by UUID
data "opnsense_acme_account" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "acme_account_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_acme_account.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `ca` (String) ACME CA endpoint.
- `description` (String) Description of the ACME account.
- `email` (String) Account email address.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this ACME account is enabled.
- `name` (String) ACME account name.
